html:
2026-0348
2026-04-21ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development Act
Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1Transfer of a part-time member of the Employment Insurance Board of AppealTransfer of Stuart Martin O’Connell of Toronto, Ontario, a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to become a part-time member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending January 8, 2027.N/A
act:
Department of Employment and Social Development Act
Budget Implementation Act, 2023, No. 1
subject: Transfer of a part-time member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal
precis: Transfer of Stuart Martin O’Connell of Toronto, Ontario, a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to become a part-time member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure for a term ending January 8, 2027.
